title: astragalus iskanderi
intro: Astragalus iskanderi, also known as Iskander's milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to Afghanistan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus iskanderi include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to make herbal teas or tonics.
